reviews.comment:
Fui el lunes pasado a la estación de servicio YPF ubicada en Diagonal 79 e/56 y 57 de La Plata. Llené el tanque. Muy buena y ágil la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Last Monday I went to the YPF gas station located on Diagonal 79 between 56th and 57th Streets in La Plata. I filled up my tank. The service was very good and efficient.
